description: Harness Engineering — auto-install deps on session start, isolate worktrees. Project-specific linters are generated by /setup-harness into the user's .claude/settings.json hooks.

hooks.command: diff -q "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/package.json" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/package.json" >/dev/null 2>&1 || (cd "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}" && cp "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/package.json" . && npm install --production 2>&1 | tail -3) || rm -f "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/package.json"
